Why We Exist

WHY ISLAMIC STREETWEAR

For too long, Muslim youth have had to choose between style and identity. Either you wear what the culture pushes — or you rep your deen but sacrifice your drip. Sunnah Supply was built to end that choice. No compromise. No dilution. Just clean, premium pieces that carry meaning and represent who you truly are.

Pieces Per Drop
100%

Shipping Info

📦 HOW IT WORKS

All orders are made to order and dispatched within 2–3 business days. You will receive a tracking number via email once your order has shipped.

🚚 DELIVERY TIMES

🇦🇺 Australia — 1–2 weeks

🇳🇿 New Zealand — 1–2 weeks

🇺🇸 USA — 1–2 weeks

🇬🇧 UK — 1–2 weeks

🇵🇰 Pakistan — 1–2 weeks

🇦🇪 UAE / Middle East — 1–2 weeks

🌍 Rest of world — 2–3 weeks

💸 SHIPPING COSTS

Australia — $12.95 AUD

New Zealand — $14.95 AUD

USA / UK / Europe — $19.95 AUD

Middle East / South Asia — $22.95 AUD

✦ FREE shipping on all orders over $200 AUD

📬 QUESTIONS?

DM us on TikTok @sunnah.supply0 or email [email protected]

Returns & Refunds

✅ WHAT WE ACCEPT

We accept returns on items that are faulty, damaged or incorrectly sent. Please contact us within 7 days of receiving your order.

❌ WHAT WE DON'T ACCEPT

As all items are made to order we do not accept returns for change of mind or incorrect size selection. Please check the size guide carefully before ordering.

🔄 HOW TO RETURN

Contact us first before sending anything back. We'll guide you through the process and arrange a replacement or refund where applicable.

📬 CONTACT US
